title: stephanomeria neomexicana
intro: Stephanomeria neomexicana, also known as New Mexico cottonweed, is a perennial plant that belongs to the sunflower family and is native to the southwestern United States. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Stephanomeria neomexicana include soothing skin irritations, reducing fever, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and salves, and can be found in some traditional medicine practices.
